mapper.select: SELECT MONTH(create_time) as month, COUNT(*) as orders, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(contract_amount, order_amount, 0)), 0) as amount FROM gh_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND YEAR(create_time) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(create_time) ORDER BY MONTH(create_time)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT salesman) FROM gh_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND salesman IS NOT NULL AND salesman != ''

SELECT agg.company_id AS id, MAX(c.corporate_name) AS companyName, agg.value AS value FROM ( SELECT company_id, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(contract_amount, order_amount, 0)), 0) AS value FROM gh_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND company_id IS NOT NULL AND company_id != '' GROUP BY company_id HAVING value > 0 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) agg INNER JOIN gh_customer c ON c.id = agg.company_id AND (c.del_flag = 0 OR c.del_flag IS NULL) ORDER BY agg.value DESC

SELECT id, order_no AS orderNo, company_name AS companyName, salesman, COALESCE(contract_amount, order_amount, 0) AS amount, create_time AS createTime FROM gh_order WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT company_id) FROM gh_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND salesman = #{salesman} AND company_id IS NOT NULL AND company_id != ''
